comment.body: Why is it Trumps fault for calling out Powell for this? WS and banks run the markets. They don't want rate cuts! The average day American who isn't in the market want the rate cuts. It benefits the average day person who isn't affected by a bearish market nearly as much as you seem to think. Bear markets will typically bring things forward that help the avg "main street resident" while hurting WS and Bankers. Things like RATE CUTS. Something Powell has massively failed at implementing correctly.
